name: Mautic Marketing Automation API
what_it_does: Open-source marketing automation platform with REST API for managing contacts, campaigns, emails, forms, and marketing workflows — offering self-hosted deployment with full data ownership and cloud-hosted options.
use_cases: Creating and segmenting contacts programmatically from lead generation agents
Triggering email campaigns and automated workflows via API for marketing agents
Querying campaign performance metrics and contact engagement data
Integrating Mautic with CRM systems via API for bidirectional contact sync
Managing landing pages, forms, and email templates programmatically
not_for: Simple email newsletters without automation (use Mailchimp or Buttondown)
Organizations without technical capacity to self-host and maintain
Real-time transactional email (use Resend, Postmark, or SendGrid)
best_when: A marketing team needs open-source marketing automation with full data ownership, self-hosted deployment, and comprehensive API access for custom integrations.
avoid_when: You need a managed SaaS marketing automation platform without infrastructure management — use HubSpot or Marketo.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for standard API access. Basic auth (username/password) also supported for simple integrations. OAuth2 authorization code flow for third-party integrations. Self-hosted instances configure their own OAuth2 credentials.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open source: completely free to self-host; no contact or email limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Mautic Cloud from $50/month; hosted services from ecosystem partners
pricing.notes: GPL v3 open source — free to self-host with unlimited contacts and emails. Infrastructure costs only. Mautic Community edition free forever. Ecosystem of hosting partners for managed deployments.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no API rate limits; performance depends on server

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documented on developer.mautic.org. Older documentation style. Error responses include codes and messages. PHP SDK well-maintained. Webhook delivery for contact and campaign events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact creation is idempotent by email address. Campaign enrollment is idempotent. Email sends are not — duplicate sends possible without deduplication logic.
known_agent_gotchas: Self-hosted setup requires PHP, MySQL, and web server — significant infrastructure investment
API behavior may vary between self-hosted versions — track version carefully
Email sending requires SMTP server configuration — API doesn't send emails directly
Campaign triggers are async — agent must poll campaign stats, not expect immediate results

security_score_components.security_notes: GPL v3 open source — full security audit possible. OAuth2 for API access. TLS depends on self-hosted server configuration. GDPR compliant when properly configured. Self-hosting provides full data control.
